title: ComfyUI Patch
description: A partial workflow update applied by writing to comfyai/apply-trigger.json. Nodes and links are merged by ID into the current graph state.

nodes.description: Nodes to add or update. Each entry is merged into the existing node with the same id (or added if new).

id.description: Node ID. Use next_node_id from comfyai/workflow-summary.md when adding new nodes.

type.description: Node type string (e.g. 'KSampler', 'CLIPTextEncode'). Required when adding a new node.

title.description: Optional human-readable label shown above the node.

size.description: Node size {0: width, 1: height} or [width, height].

widgets_values.description: Ordered array (or map) of the node's widget values. Slot order matches the node type definition.

inputs.description: Input slot descriptors. Usually not needed in patches — rewire via 'links' instead.

properties.description: Node-type-specific properties (e.g. show_text for display nodes).

links.description: Links to add or replace. Each link is matched by its link_id (first element) and replaced in full, or appended if new.

items.description: Link tuple: [link_id, src_node_id, src_slot, dst_node_id, dst_slot, dtype]. Use next_link_id from comfyai/workflow-summary.md for new links.

prefixItems.description: link_id — unique ID for this link
src_slot — output slot index on the source node
dst_slot — input slot index on the destination node

groups.description: Groups (visual bounding boxes). If present, replaces the entire groups array.
